ファイル共有でよくある失敗と解決方法: Common File Sharing Mistakes and How to Fix Them
QRコードが読めない、パスワードを伝え忘れた、容量が大きい、期限切れになったなど: Covers common file sharing problems such as unreadable QR codes, forgotten passwords, large files, and expired links.
FS!QRを使えば、ブラウザだけでファイルをアップロードし、QRコードやURLで: With FS!QR you can upload files from nothing but a browser and share them via QR code or URL. To get the most out of that convenience, give recipients clear instructions and handle expiry dates and passwords deliberately.
ITに不慣れな相手へ送るときは、ファイル形式も重要です。確認してもらうだけならP: File format also matters when your recipient isn't comfortable with technology. If they only need to view the file, an easy-to-open format such as PDF or an image keeps the burden on their side low.
QRコードが読み取れない原因は、画面の明るさ、距離、角度、コードの表示サイズ、カ: QR codes fail to scan because of screen brightness, distance, angle, display size, or camera focus. Codes shown via a projector or in a screen-shared online meeting tend to come out especially small.
QRコードが読めない場合のURLも用意したか: Did you include a URL for people who can't scan the QR code?
QRコードは便利ですが、読み取り環境に左右されます。大事な資料を配るときは、QR: QR codes are convenient, but they depend on scanning conditions. When distributing important materials, prepare both a QR code and a URL and you'll be covered.
URL、ID、パスワードを同じメッセージにすべて書く。: Putting the URL, ID, and password all in the same message.
URLはメール、パスワードは別チャネルで送る。案内文にその旨を明記する。: Send the URL by email and the password through a separate channel — and say so in your message.
おすすめは、共有URLとパスワードを別の経路で伝える方法です。たとえば、URLは: Our recommendation is to send the share URL and the password by different routes. For example, email the URL and share the password in chat. Add a note like "I'll send the password separately in chat" and the recipient won't be left guessing.
ただし、期限を伝えていないと相手は困ります。共有するときは「本日中にダウンロード: If you don't communicate the deadline, though, your recipient is left stranded. When sharing, state it explicitly: "please download today" or "valid until June 15". For materials that must stay available long term, a proper storage location is a better fit than temporary sharing.
オンライン会議ではチャットにもURLを貼る: In online meetings, paste the URL into the chat as well
カメラを近づけすぎず、少し離して読み取る: Don't hold the camera too close — scan from a short distance
スマートフォンで保存先が分からない: Can't find where the file was saved on a smartphone
パスワードやIDの伝え方は決めたか: Did you decide how to communicate the password and ID?
パスワードやIDを伝え忘れた: Forgot to send the password or ID
ファイルサイズが大きくて時間がかかる: The file is large and takes a long time
ファイル共有, トラブル, QRコード, パスワード, ダウンロード, 期限切れ: file sharing, troubleshooting, QR code, password, download, expired link, solutions
ファイル共有の失敗は、送る前の一手間でかなり減らせる: A little preparation before sending prevents most file-sharing failures
ファイル共有は便利ですが、実際の現場では小さなトラブルがよく起こります。QRコー: File sharing is convenient, but small problems crop up constantly in practice: the QR code won't scan, the password is missing, the file can't be found on a smartphone, or a large file takes forever to upload.
ファイル名と内容は一致しているか: Do the file name and contents match?
一時共有は、不要なファイルを残さないために有効ですが、相手が期限内にダウンロード: Temporary sharing is a good way to avoid leaving stray files behind, but if the recipient misses the window you'll have to share again. An expired link is not a failure — it is precisely the safety mechanism that keeps files from lingering.
会議直前の大容量アップロードは避ける: Avoid uploading large files right before a meeting
動画、高画質写真、スキャンPDF、ZIPファイルなどは、アップロードやダウンロー: Videos, high-resolution photos, scanned PDFs, and ZIP archives all take time to upload and download. Depending on the recipient's connection, transfers may even fail midway.
受信者が「開けない」と言っている: The recipient says they can't open it
受信者がスマートフォンでファイルを開いた場合、ダウンロード後の保存先が分からない: When recipients open a file on their smartphone, they often can't tell where it was saved after downloading. PDFs, ZIPs, and Office files in particular behave differently depending on the device and browser.
古い版を選んでいないか: Are you sure it isn't an outdated version?
多くの失敗は、共有前の確認と、相手への案内文を少し整えるだけで防げます。ここでは: Most failures can be prevented just by checking before you share and tidying up the instructions you send. Here we walk through the most common failures with browser-based file sharing like FS!QR — and how to fix them.
大容量ファイルを送るときは、必要なファイルだけに絞り、可能であれば圧縮や分割を検: When sending large files, narrow the selection to just what's needed, and consider compressing or splitting them. Be careful not to over-compress images or videos meant for review, though — if the quality falls short you'll just have to resend. Where it helps, keep a lightweight version for review separate from the official originals.
安全のためにパスワードやIDを設定しても、受信者に伝え忘れるとダウンロードできま: Setting a password or ID is good for security, but if you forget to pass it on, the recipient can't download anything. Conversely, bundling the URL and password into one message raises the stakes if a third party ever sees it.
急いでいると、古い版や違うファイルをアップロードしてしまうことがあります。特に「: When you're in a hurry it's easy to upload an old or wrong file — especially when several files are named "final" or "latest".
最後に、ファイルを送る前に確認したい項目をまとめます。毎回すべてを厳密に確認する: Finally, here is a checklist to run through before sending a file. You don't need to apply every item rigorously every time, but for business documents and important files it pays off.
正式データは時間に余裕を持って共有する: Share official data with time to spare
相手がスマートフォンで受け取る可能性がある場合は、「ダウンロード後はブラウザのダ: If the recipient may receive the file on a smartphone, it's thoughtful to add: "after downloading, check your browser's download history or your device's file manager app". For images alone, long-pressing to save or using the share menu may be the way.
相手がファイルを開けない場合、共有方法ではなくファイル形式が原因のこともあります: When a recipient can't open a file, the cause is sometimes the file format rather than the sharing method. Formats that need special apps, legacy Office formats, and compressed archives may not open on every device.
相手が開ける形式か: Is the format one the recipient can open?
確認だけなら軽量版を先に送る: If it's just for review, send a lightweight version first
読み取れない人にはURLも併記する: Include the URL alongside the code for those who can't scan it
送る相手は正しいか: Is this going to the right person?
送信前に、ファイル名、更新日時、ファイルサイズを確認します。重要な資料では、一度: Before sending, check the file name, modification date, and size. For important materials, open the download page yourself once and confirm the file name shown before pointing the recipient to it. If you do share the wrong file, tell the recipient right away and send the correct one as a fresh share.
閲覧だけが目的ならPDFに変換する、画像は一般的なJPEGやPNGにする、複数フ: Sensible precautions include converting view-only documents to PDF, using common image formats like JPEG or PNG, and — before bundling multiple files into a ZIP — checking that the recipient can actually open ZIPs. Just because it opens on your machine doesn't mean it opens on theirs.
